title: Sub items under sub items
excerpt: I just upgraded to an Enterprise account from Pro. At Elevate it was announced that you can now create sub items and have sub items under that. What do I need to do to add this feature to my account? I am not seeing it o…

posts.author: jbarbieri (Jaime B)
posts.cookedHtml: I just upgraded to an Enterprise account from Pro. At Elevate it was announced that you can now create sub items and have sub items under that. What do I need to do to add this feature to my account? I am not seeing it on current and or new boards.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s still in gradual release. I believe it should be available by EOY, but I don’t remember the exact details.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: desazza (Simone)
posts.cookedHtml: Here you can find better information
